## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, workflows, and performance updates.](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [9 articles delivered last week, 7 scheduled for this week; content production on track](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Several workflows (comparison pages, CMS publishing, Medium) in progress or near completion](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Social post automation currently out of scope; investigating alternatives (e.g., Kappa for content gap analysis)](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=394.0)
  - [Performance metrics show positive trends in LLM visibility and HubSpot goals; focus on optimizing high-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Workflow Updates

  - [9 articles delivered last week, 7 scheduled for this week](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=205.0)
  - [Comparison pages staged; proceeding with competitor vs. competitor pages](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Integration page workflow testing in progress](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [CMS publishing workflow nearly complete; minor issues with code block display](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [Medium workflow staged; facing H2/H3 formatting limitations due to API deprecation](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)
  - [ImageGen publishing automation in progress; styling refinements ongoing](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)

### Content Gap Analysis and Ideation

  - [Discussed narrowing scope to existing workflow vs. new work stream](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Exploring Kappa's content gap feature as starting point](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Victor suggested focusing on auto-tagging questions lacking bot answers](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Team to investigate feasibility and provide update by week's end](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

### FAQ Implementation

  - [Victor proposed automating FAQ addition to various page types](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [Currently done manually for some feature pages](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=851.0)
  - [Vivek: No separate workflow, but can be incorporated into content generation](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=915.0)
  - [Agreement to prioritize adding FAQs to landing pages, feature pages, and use cases](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=996.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Slight dip in non-branded impressions, potentially due to Google updates](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=1102.0)
  - [HubSpot data shows sessions ahead of goals; influenced contacts trending positively](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [LLM visibility strong across most prompt categories](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=1197.0)
  - [Focus on new contacts as key metric for top-of-funnel performance](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)

### Content Optimization Strategy

  - [Emphasis on refining high-performing GrowthX-created pages](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [Refreshing older content underway (2 pieces this week)](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=1448.0)
  - [Exploring video addition to boost SERP visibility and user experience](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [Considering tools like Notebook.lm for efficient video creation](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)

  - [Refine performance reporting to focus on GrowthX-created pages](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)
  - [Explore video integration for high-performing content](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=1480.0)
  - [Follow up on discussed issues and provide updates](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Continue with planned content pipeline and refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/VRaUq9x7stsBZq-42W5Xc64EzzL16Wcd?tab=summary&timestamp=1261.0)
